_comment_risk: Risk management — all monetary values as % of balance
_comment_leverage: Leverage is determined dynamically from confidence score
_comment_confidence: Minimum confidence score to enter a trade
notes: v4: Confidence engine (0-100) drives leverage (3x-10x). Multi-strategy: pullback+breakout+scalp (scalp disabled). Market regime detection routes to correct sub-strategy. Risk: 1% per trade, max 3 concurrent, -3% daily cap. Paper mode uses identical leverage math. BingX: isolated margin + leverage set before every order.
